name: rabbit-editor
description: A bare bone Text Editor library for javascript, Aimed to be small, simple, efficient and easy to extend.

scripts.build: deno run --allow-all build.ts && tsup lib/index.ts && npm run pack
scripts.deploy: npm run build:page &&  git subtree push --prefix dist origin gh-pages
npm run build:page && git subtree split --prefix dist -b temp-gh-pages && git push origin temp-gh-pages:gh-pages --force && git branch -D temp-gh-pages

author: friday candour
